# resetPassword

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

Execute the resetPassword mutation

## Usage

```bash
csdk reset-password --input.clientMutationId <String> --input.roleId <UUID> --input.resetToken <String> --input.newPassword <String>
```

## Examples

### Run resetPassword

```bash
csdk reset-password --input.clientMutationId <String> --input.roleId <UUID> --input.resetToken <String> --input.newPassword <String>
```
